description: AI-powered end-to-end content creation tools + consulting for social media, shorts, dramas, trailers, and animation

buyer_personas.title: Content Creator / Influencer
buyer_personas.context: Solopreneur or small team. Needs fast, professional-looking output.

buyer_personas.title: Production Director / Studio Head
buyer_personas.context: Manages projects for clients. Wants to increase throughput and reduce labor.

buyer_personas.title: Creative / Content Director (Brand/Agency)
buyer_personas.context: Coordinates content for multiple channels. Needs end-to-end workflow.

buyer_personas.title: Marketing Manager
buyer_personas.context: Needs regular video/short content but limited budget and timeline.

key_pain_points: Creating professional-quality content takes days/weeks with current tools
Can't afford to hire full production crew
Social media demands constant new content (daily/weekly posting)
Using 5+ different tools (editing, effects, voiceover, subtitles, etc.)
High cost per video produced ($500-$5000 per piece with freelancers)
Steep learning curve on professional software (Adobe, DaVinci, etc.)
Quality inconsistency across projects and team members
Can't iterate quickly on creative (A/B testing takes weeks)
Freelancer management overhead and communication delays
Need to adapt same content for multiple platforms/formats
buying_signals: Currently using multiple paid tools (Adobe, CapCut Pro, ElevenLabs, etc.)
Job postings for video editors, motion graphics, or content creators
Hiring freelance creators/editors on Upwork, Fiverr, etc.
LinkedIn posts about content creation bottlenecks or scaling challenges
Talking about tools and workflows on Instagram/TikTok/YouTube
Producing 3+ video/short pieces per week (volume signal)
Recent funding or investment announcement (budget availability)
Expanding into new platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels, etc.)
value_proposition: Professional-quality shorts, dramas, trailers, and animations in hours not days
Complete end-to-end system (script → voiceover → editing → effects → subtitles)
Replace 5+ paid tools with one unified platform
No hiring crew — scale output without fixed headcount
One system, infinite platform outputs (auto-format for TikTok, Reels, YouTube, etc.)
Customize to your style (Von can do custom work; system learns your aesthetic)
From solopreneur to agency — system scales with your needs

starter.name: Creator Essentials
starter.target: Solo creators, small channels, testing the platform

pro.name: Creator Pro
pro.target: Professional creators, small agencies, 2-5 person teams

studio.name: Studio Custom
includes: Direct work with Von on custom projects
studio.target: Production companies, agencies, brands needing custom solutions

Creator_Influencer.name: Content Creators & Influencers
Creator_Influencer.primary_pain: Time to create content while keeping up posting schedule
Creator_Influencer.message_angle: Create 10x faster. Professional quality without the crew.

Production_Studio.name: Production & Creative Studios
Production_Studio.description: Production companies, creative agencies, commercial studios
Production_Studio.message_angle: Take on 3x more projects without hiring. Automate the repetitive work.

Brand_Marketing.name: Brands & Marketing Teams
Brand_Marketing.description: In-house marketing, brand social teams, e-commerce
Brand_Marketing.primary_pain: Producing enough content on limited budget
Brand_Marketing.message_angle: Professional video content for every campaign. No expensive freelancers.

Agency_Content.name: Agencies (Content/Media)
Agency_Content.description: Full-service agencies, media agencies, digital studios
Agency_Content.primary_pain: Managing multiple clients + high content demand
Agency_Content.message_angle: Deliver more to every client. Predictable timelines. Consistent quality.

messaging.headline: Professional Content. Studio Quality. On Demand.
messaging.subheading: Create shorts, dramas, trailers, and animations in hours, not weeks. One system. Infinite possibilities.

email_templates.subject_hook_studio: Scale projects without hiring more editors
email_templates.subject_hook_brand: Video content for every campaign (no freelance bills)
email_templates.subject_hook_agency: Deliver more, faster, to every client
email_templates.opening_pain: Most creators tell us their biggest bottleneck is time: content creation is eating 20+ hours a week and they're still barely keeping up.
email_templates.opening_pain_studio: Production companies we work with often turn down projects because they can't hit the timeline without adding headcount.
